hero.badge_desktop: Meta Ads -> Lead Filtering -> Booked Treatment Plans
hero.subtitle: Booked.Dental helps implant and veneer clinics turn ad traffic into filtered patient opportunities. Every form answer teaches the AI which people are ready for treatment, so campaigns optimize toward customers instead of clicks.
hero.trusted: Built for implant and cosmetic clinics that want serious patients, not vanity metrics.
hero.trial_line: 14-day trial · No long-term contract · See lead quality before committing.

stats.time_label: Typical Time to First Patient Opportunity

problem.description: Generic campaigns chase cheap clicks and unqualified forms. Booked.Dental adds a filtering layer that learns who is serious about implants or veneers, then feeds that signal back into the AI so your budget moves toward people who can become patients.
problem.bullet2: No more paying for empty traffic
problem.bullet3: No more reports full of vanity metrics

services.subtitle: A patient acquisition system that filters intent, trains the AI, and sends your team better opportunities.
services.creative_library_desc: We use high-performing UGC-style ads built for implant and cosmetic dentistry. The creative attracts attention from people already thinking about treatment.
services.fast_launch_desc: Because the creative foundation and funnel are already built, your campaign can go live quickly without months of testing from scratch.
services.quality_inquiries_title: Lead Filtering Before Your Team Sees It
services.quality_inquiries_desc: Prospects answer intent-based questions before they reach your clinic. The system filters out poor fits and gives the AI cleaner data about who is actually ready for treatment.
services.efficient_costs_desc: Instead of optimizing around clicks or form fills alone, the campaign learns from filtered lead quality so spend moves toward people more likely to become patients.
services.call_tracking_desc: Every qualified or rejected lead improves the targeting signal. Over time, the AI gets better at finding serious implant and veneer prospects, not just cheap traffic.
services.ai_booking_desc: Filtered prospects are routed into a simple follow-up flow so your team can focus on high-intent people who already match your treatment criteria.

how_it_works.step1_desc: We confirm your market is open and make sure your clinic is a good fit. We only work with one clinic per area, so competitors cannot access the same campaign system once your market is secured.
how_it_works.step2_title: Launch the Creative and Filter Funnel
how_it_works.step2_desc: We launch proven ads and a treatment-specific filtering flow. Prospects are asked the questions that matter before your team spends time on them.
how_it_works.step3_title: Train the AI on Lead Quality
how_it_works.step3_desc: The campaign learns from filtered outcomes. As the system sees which prospects match your ideal patient profile, it optimizes toward customers instead of clicks.

case_studies.subtitle: What changes when campaigns are optimized around filtered patient quality.
case_studies.clinic1_name: Full Arch Implant Clinic - Phoenix, AZ
case_studies.clinic1_challenge: The clinic was spending heavily on generic ads and receiving form submissions from people who were not financially or clinically ready.
case_studies.clinic1_result: A filtered funnel identified higher-intent implant prospects and helped the practice focus on patients with real treatment potential.
case_studies.clinic2_challenge: A new practice needed momentum without wasting budget on broad interest and low-intent traffic.
case_studies.clinic2_result: UGC creative and qualification questions helped the AI learn which prospects were ready for cosmetic treatment.

market_exclusivity.description: Booked.Dental works with only one implant or cosmetic dental clinic per local market. Once your clinic secures an area, competing practices nearby do not get access to the same creative, filtering system, or AI learning loop.
market_exclusivity.point1_title: Your competitors cannot buy in once you do.
market_exclusivity.point1_desc: When your market is secured, no competing practice in your area gets access to the same campaign system.
market_exclusivity.point2_desc: If your area is open, you can secure it before another clinic nearby does.

testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from implant and cosmetic practices using the system.

roi_calculator.subtitle: A recent campaign produced about ₪86,000 in deals and roughly 38x ROI when rounded. Use the calculator below to see how a few better-filtered opportunities can change production.
roi_calculator.investment_suffix: estimated return multiple from filtered opportunities
roi_calculator.insight_bold: The point is not cheaper leads. It is better training data.
roi_calculator.insight_rest: When lead filtering shows the AI which prospects become real customers, spend can move toward people with higher treatment intent.

who_its_for.subtitle: Booked.Dental is built for clinics that want better patient quality and a smarter acquisition system.
who_its_for.bullet1: Clinics offering full-arch implants, All-on-4, or All-on-6 procedures
who_its_for.bullet2: Practices focused on cosmetic dentistry such as veneers
who_its_for.bullet3: Offices with capacity for more high-value treatment plans
who_its_for.bullet4: Clinics that want filtered patient opportunities instead of random leads

who_its_not_for.subtitle: The system is built for high-value treatments and clinics ready to grow with better-qualified prospects.
who_its_not_for.bullet2: Clinics looking for cheap leads instead of serious patients
who_its_not_for.bullet3: Offices only testing marketing with minimal budget
who_its_not_for.bullet4: Practices without capacity for implant or cosmetic treatment plans

creatives_video.subtitle: Ad creatives built to attract high-intent implant and veneer prospects into a filtered funnel.
creatives_video.caption1: UGC creative built to attract high-intent implant prospects.
creatives_video.caption2: Creative angles designed for implant and cosmetic dental clinics.
creatives_video.caption3: Ads built to feed the filter with better patient intent signals.

advanced_call_tracking.subtitle: Booked.Dental is designed to help campaigns learn who your real customers are, then optimize toward more people like them.
advanced_call_tracking.item1: Intent-based questions before prospects reach your team
advanced_call_tracking.item2: Lead quality feedback connected to campaign learning
advanced_call_tracking.item3: Filtering that separates serious patients from casual browsers
advanced_call_tracking.item4: AI signals based on treatment readiness, not clicks alone
advanced_call_tracking.item5: Cleaner data for smarter ad optimization over time
advanced_call_tracking.item6: Your team focuses on prospects who match your treatment criteria

booked_dental_difference.para1: Most campaigns optimize around surface-level activity: clicks, impressions, and basic form fills.
booked_dental_difference.para2: Booked.Dental adds a filtering layer that captures intent, treatment fit, and readiness before your team spends time on a prospect.
booked_dental_difference.para3: That feedback teaches the AI what a real customer looks like for your clinic, so the campaign gets smarter over time.
booked_dental_difference.callout: The goal is simple: spend less budget on curiosity and more budget on people with real treatment potential.
booked_dental_difference.footer: Booked.Dental combines proven creative, filtering, and AI learning so your acquisition system improves as it gathers better data.

risk_free_trial.para1: For qualified clinics, Booked.Dental offers a trial so you can evaluate lead quality inside your practice before committing long term.
risk_free_trial.para2_prefix: This lets you see patient intent and fit with

cta.subtitle: If your clinic has capacity for more high-value treatment plans, check whether your market is still available. Booked.Dental partners with only one clinic per local market.
cta.footer: No long-term contract. No pressure. Just a clear look at whether the system fits your clinic.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before checking if your market is available.
faq.q1: How quickly can we start seeing qualified opportunities?
faq.a1: Most clinics begin seeing patient opportunities shortly after launch, depending on market conditions, ad approval timelines, and how quickly the filtering funnel gathers enough data.
faq.q2: What kind of ROI is possible?
faq.a2: ROI depends on market, case value, conversion quality, and follow-up. In a recent campaign, filtered opportunities produced about ₪86,000 in deals, or roughly 38x when rounded. The goal is to use filtering data so budget moves toward people with real treatment potential.
faq.q3: Do you guarantee exclusivity in my market?
faq.a3: Yes. Booked.Dental works with only one clinic per local market. Once a clinic secures a market, we do not give competing practices nearby access to the same system.
faq.q4: What types of clinics does Booked.Dental work with?
faq.a4: We work with clinics focused on high-ticket treatments such as full-arch implants, All-on-4 procedures, and cosmetic veneers.
faq.a5: Prospects answer treatment-specific questions before they reach your team. Their answers help separate casual browsers from serious patients and create better data for campaign optimization.
faq.q6: How does this teach the AI?
faq.a6: The campaign learns from filtered lead quality. As more prospects move through the funnel, the system gets clearer signals about which people look like real future patients instead of just clickers.
faq.a7: Qualified prospects are routed into a follow-up flow so your team can focus on people who already match your treatment criteria.
faq.a8: No. Qualified clinics can start with a trial period to evaluate the system before committing long term.
faq.walk_through: and we'll walk you through everything.
